## Checklist

- [ ] Branch and commits follow the naming/format in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Change is scoped to one ticket and one surface where possible.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed.
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behaviour or setup changed.
- [ ] Verified locally (tests pass / app runs) — see "How verified" above.
